positive: A highly stylized, isometric view illustration of a perfect reading nook. Features include a stack of vintage books, a steaming cup of coffee, a plush blanket draped over a chair, and a potted succulent plant. Scandinavian aesthetic, hygge vibes, clean lines, muted earth tones (beige, sage green, terracotta), flat illustration style, vector art quality, natural sunlight streaming in, soft shadows, minimalist design, wholesome, cozy, perfect for print merchandise.
